feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: hit this shit varlet
entry.content: hit this shit varlet

entry.content: Daddy

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: See the numbers listed after each game title, those are called builds. Steam has…
entry.content: See the numbers listed after each game title, those are called builds. Steam has its own numbering system when a game is updated and their useful if you are pirating. Just go on steamdb, search up a game and click patches. I tend to cross reference the build numbers every couple months to check if there are any updates. Maybe if you export the file directory as a txt and paste it in grok, then the AI can tell you which builds are outdated. Also yes, you can add comments to windows file explorer

entry.title: /g/ Technology: CHINA WILL SOON LOSE ACCESS TO DUV MACHINE
entry.content: Huawei, SMIC, YMTC, and CXMT all rely on existing ASML DUV machines. The new MATCH ACT(H.R.8170) would bar the servicing and maintenance of these machines in China, effectively making them unrenewable. All chinese chips manufacturing including DDR5 will be severely limited and likely become completely dead soon

Jamaica Off the Florida Keys There's a place called Kokomo That's where you wanna go To get away from it all Bodies in the sand Tropical drink melting in your hand We'll be falling in love To the rhythm of a steel drum band Down in Kokomo Aruba, Jamaica, ooh, I wanna take you To Bermuda, Bahama, come on, pretty mama Key Largo, Montego, Ooh, baby why don't we go? entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /CEG/ - Cartoon Expansion General
entry.content: /ceg/ - Imminent Capeshit Film Synergy Edition Post any expansion-related material (breast or butt expansion, weight gain, inflation to name a few) containing human or humanoid characters. Cartoon and vidya characters are permitted) All expansion must be focused on related material (characters from cartoons, games, comics, or anime). Have some fun, above all else. Any original content is appreciated! Edits, fics, and other pictures are all great. Boorus: https://curveybooru.com/index.php?p age=p

entry.content: omfg...

entry.title: /int/ International: I have arrived in Mexico City, from NYC Do you have any questions for me >do you…
entry.content: I have arrived in Mexico City, from NYC Do you have any questions for me >do you like it Yes. I like it more than NYC. It's way cheaper and feels more exciting. Both NYC and CDMX have world cup events going on but you can feel CDMX humming with activity due to the game, while in NYC it's more contained in sports bars and whatnot >is it scary / dangerous / dirty It's actually a little cleaner than NYC in the city center lol. But it's definitely more sketchy especially at night and outside of tour

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: been playing my board game again season 5 changes involve reducing the amount of…
entry.content: been playing my board game again season 5 changes involve reducing the amount of mana in the game because the last time i went on a binge the meta devolved into spamming high level fireballs at each other until you had like 3 pieces left most of the changes are to chaos, nerf to how much mana a K card gives and reworked the dragon piece, and reworked the card draw mechanics, made some small changes to how stuff works to prevent turn 1 check this is very exciting Your fortune: Better not tell you

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >"Gimme Shelter" features prominent guest vocals by American singer Merry Clayto…
entry.content: >"Gimme Shelter" features prominent guest vocals by American singer Merry Clayton. Clayton – about four months pregnant – made her recording with just a few takes. Upon returning home, Clayton suffered a miscarriage, attributed by some sources to her exertions during the recording. Any other bands that perform abortions?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Fuck TRUSTEDF57 - infinityhotel.it
entry.content: Hi, 4chan folks: I’m a new user and I have a request: could someone launch a massive DDoS attack against this website (TRUSTEDF57 - infinityhotel.it)? As many of you know, there was an earthquake in Venezuela and about 50,000 people are missing; however, because of the website I mentioned earlier, all information regarding the missing persons is being replaced by spam reports (promoting visits to that site).

entry.title: /int/ International: Air conditioning does not do what you think. Corporations have hynotized you int…
entry.content: Air conditioning does not do what you think. Corporations have hynotized you into thinking that it cools your home, but in reality what it does is take the hot air inside and then put it outside, which then goes back inside eventually. The hotter it is outside, the more air conditioning you need, and the more air conditioning you use, the hotter it is outside. Do not fall for this trap.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Where tf is the ammo in this game
entry.content: I am playing on hard and I very quickly end up in situations where I will have 0 ammo and realistically cannot survive a fight. It is otherwise not a very hard game and I do not have the impression I am wasting ammo or mussing a ridiculous amount of shots
